data_coverage_summary: The Providers API covers service-provider network data used for dispatch decisions, including provider creation, provider information lookup, trade-based provider retrieval, dispatch-setting updates, ranking retrieval, recent-provider discovery, and provider feedback collection.
buyer_guidance: Use this area when ServiceNow needs awareness of who can do the work, not just what work exists. It supports provider selection, dispatch governance, and service-quality workflows, making it useful for OT break-fix routing where field-service vendor choice matters.
overview: The Providers section exposes the service-provider network that sits behind ServiceChannel dispatch. The reference shows endpoints for creating blank provider records, getting provider info, retrieving providers by trade, changing do-not-dispatch settings, submitting provider feedback, retrieving provider ranking status, and using OData to pull recent, detailed, or last-used provider information for a location. That makes this integration area valuable when ServiceNow must coordinate vendor selection, dispatch eligibility, or provider-quality intelligence.

available_data.category: Provider master and subscriber relationship data
available_data.description: Core provider records and subscriber-link controls needed to manage which providers participate in service delivery.
Endpoints for selecting appropriate providers based on trade fit, ranking, and dispatch preferences.
data_points: providers by trade or trade ID

available_data.category: Provider quality and mobile capability signals
available_data.description: Signals that help ServiceNow workflows reason about provider performance and mobile readiness.

ingest_considerations: Provider selection data is operationally sensitive because it influences dispatch routing and vendor performance governance.
Trade-based retrieval makes this API useful for automatically narrowing vendor options from ServiceNow incident, CMDB, or asset context.
Ranking and feedback endpoints can enrich supplier scorecards or dispatch decision support in ServiceNow.
Provider and subscriber relationship data should be modeled carefully to avoid cross-tenant routing mistakes.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Based on the Providers section in the ServiceChannel v3 Swagger reference and the OAuth-protected API access guidance in the ServiceChannel authentication and overview documentation.
